name: Natl Bath - Get Serviceable Zip Codes by Division

content.query:
/** Get the zip codes for FHIA **/
SELECT 
brz.[ZipCode]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[Division]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP] brz
 ,[EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT_GROUP] prg
 where
 brz.ProductGroupID = prg.ProductGroupID
 and brz.Division = 'FHI'
 and ZipCode not in ('00000')
 and prg.[Active] = 'True'
 --and prg.ProductGroupID in ('SWR-BRem','SWR-WABth')
 order BY
prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,brz.[ZipCode]


/** Get the zip codes for Pacific **/

SELECT distinct
brz.[ZipCode]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[Division]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP] brz
 ,[EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT_GROUP] prg
 where
 brz.ProductGroupID = prg.ProductGroupID
 and brz.Division = 'PBC'
 and ZipCode not in ('00000')
 and prg.[Active] = 'True'
 and prg.ProductGroup in ('Shower')
 order BY
prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,brz.[ZipCode]


/** Get the zip codes for MaxHome **/

SELECT 
brz.[ZipCode]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[Division]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP] brz
 ,[EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT_GROUP] prg
 where
 brz.ProductGroupID = prg.ProductGroupID
 and brz.Division = 'MXH'
 and ZipCode not in ('00000')
 and prg.[Active] = 'True'
 and prg.ProductGroup in ('Bath')
 --and brz.BranchID not in ('MXH-HUB')
 order BY
prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,brz.[ZipCode]

/** For Homesmart... only DC, VA and MD... rest supplied by Beth **/

SELECT distinct
brz.[ZipCode]
 FROM [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP] brz,
(
 SELECT [ZipCode]
 FROM [ODS].[MKTDATA_ZIP_CODES_DB_DELUXE_BUSINESS]
 WHERE
 [PrimaryRecord] = 'P'
 and [State] in ('MD','VA','DC')
 ) zip
 where 
 brz.Division = 'HSI'
 and brz.ZipCode = zip.ZipCode
